Arena

  • Details

Type

PvP

Seasonal

No

Token Requirement

Arena Ticket

Groups

  • Routine
  • Ranked Matches

You can use heroes to battle others, increase Arena Tiers, and earn rich rewards. Feel free to customize your defense formation and maps to up the challenge difficulty for others.

Contents

  • 1 Rules
    • 1.1 Level and Upgrade Adjustments
      • 1.1.1 Hero Levels
      • 1.1.2 Non-Season Mode
    • 1.2 Basics
    • 1.3 Champion
  • 2 Arena Rankings
    • 2.1 Rules
  • 3 Tiers and Rewards
    • 3.1 Basic Tiers
    • 3.2 Champion Tiers
  • 4 Blessing
    • 4.1 History of Blessings
  • 5 Champion Store
  • 6 Trivia
  • 7 Change History
  • 8 References

Rules[]

Level and Upgrade Adjustments[]

Hero Levels[]

In the Arena, Hero Levels are adjusted according to the baseline level (applied to both offensive and defensive Arena formations):
Hero Levels exceeding 151 are set to 151 (baseline level).
For Hero Levels between the baseline level and 240, 10% will be added to the baseline level, setting their actual level for the Arena. Unlocked skills remain unaffected. Hero Equipment Levels are adjusted to match Hero Levels.

Non-Season Mode[]

Season upgrade content is not effective in non-season modes. This includes: Season Equipment Resonance Levels, Season Equipment, Season MAgic Charms, Season Artifacts.

Basics[]

  1. In the Arena, you can spend tickets to challenge others on the same server.
  2. Defeat other players to gain Arena Points and increase your tier.
  3. You can get tier rewards the first time you reach a new tier.
  4. Rewards are tallied and sent out every Monday at 01:00 (UTC+1). The higher your tier, the greater the rewards.
  5. Players who have more than 3,200 Arena Points will be ranked in the Champion Rankings.
  6. If a player hasn't logged in [sic] for over 14 days, Chippy and Hammie will take over the defense to fend off any challengers. The previous defense formation will be restored once the player logs back in.

Champion[]

  1. Players who enter the Champion rankings will get Champion Points and be ranked accordingly. Defeat opponents to improve your ranking.
  2. Rewards are tallied and sent our every day at 01:00 (UTC+1). The higher your tier, the greater the rewards.

Arena Rankings[]

To advance in tiers, players must defeat opponents in battle. Upon accumulating a specified number of Arena Points, higher tiers are unlocked, enhancing the rewards received. Each newly unlocked tier also grants a First-Time Reward.

An Arena Ticket is required to initiate an attack. Each player receives Arena Ticket ×5 daily after the reset. Additionally, players can purchase up to Arena Ticket ×5 more using Diamonds, with the cost increasing for each additional ticket purchased. This sets the maximum number of attacks per day at 10.

  • Time remaining for daily rewards:
June 09, 2026 12:00:00 AM UTC 23h 39m 55s (Update)
  • Time remaining for weekly rewards:
June 15, 2026 12:00:00 AM UTC 6d 23h 39m 55s (Update)

Rules[]

  1. Increase your ranking before Friday and try not to become one of the last 100 players in Champion tier, or else you'll need to play a Defensive Match at the weekend.
  2. Players who need to play a defensive match at the weekend will be challenged by 1 player with a lower tier and points on the 2 days of the weekend and will be demoted to Legendary III tier if they lose the Defensive Match. If they win, they will stay in the same tier.
  3. Players can be challenged at any time during this phase. Please set a formation in advance.

Tiers and Rewards[]

Basic Tiers[]

Before the first 200 Champions appear on the server, Tiers are determined based on Arena Points. The Basic Tier range is distributed across Arena Points from 1,000 to 3,000.

Champion Tiers[]

Once the first 200 Champions emerge on the server, Basic Tiers are assigned based on Arena Points. A dedicated pool consisting of these initial 200 Champions is formed, and the Basic Tier range is determined according to the Arena Points accumulated by these Champions.

Arena Master will send information letter:

Challenge Match starting soon
SenderArena Master
Time/DateTranscription missing

Dear traveler:

The first round of Champions have been chosen, and the Challenge Match is starting soon. Before the Assessment every Friday, players reaching Legendary III and ranked among the Top 100 are qualified for Challenge Match. Complete Challenge Match during the weekend to be among the Champion Rankings.

Hope to see you there!

Arena Master
AttachmentsNone

Blessing[]

During certain phases in a season, a Blessing effect can be applied to all battles in Arena.

History of Blessings[]

Blessing Effect Dates Applied
Blessing of Life Increase HP by 100%. Dec 8, 2025 — Jan 12, 2026
Energy Decay Reduces Energy recovery efficiency from all sources by 30%. 2026-03-09 — 2026-04-13
ATK SPD Up Increases ATK SPD by 45. 2026-03-09 — 2026-04-13
Energy Decay Reduces Energy recovery efficiency from all sources by 30%. 2026-05-13 — 2026-05-28
ATK SPD Up Increases ATK SPD by 45. 2026-05-13 — 2026-05-28

Champion Store[]

Once a player reaches the first 200 Champions, an additional store—the Champion Store—becomes available under the Arena Store at the Emporium.

Trivia[]

  • Arena is one of the first Battle Modes added with the game's release.
  • Arena is one of the Non-Season Battle Modes, which is permanent.
  • The total amount of "First Time Reward" across all tiers is: Diamond ×23,395, Temporal Essence ×160, and Twilight Essence ×100.

Change History[]

Released in Version 1.0
[Edit History]
Version 1.6.4
  • Blessings available again.

Version 1.6.2

  • Blessings available again.

Version 1.5.3

  • Blessing feature added to battles.

Version 1.5.1

  • New Arena map updated for Arena V - Special.

Version 1.4.1

  • Added a new Arena map Arena V - Special to replace Arena VI - Special.

Version 1.3.2

  • Weekly challenges removed as Arena Coin rewards are consolidated in weekly Lucky Flip rewards instead achieved by Arena battle quests.

Version 1.3.1

  • Arena Ticket item replaced with Warrior Guarantee item. Functionality remains the same.

Version 1.0.12

  • Champion league players' Arena scores reset to 3000.
  • Daily and Weekly Arena Rewards were reset.
  • Added a baseline level mechanism, which becomes effective once a player's Resonance Level reaches 151.

Version 1.0.11

  • Significantly increased the number of Diamonds rewarded for reaching a tier for the first time.
  • Added weekly quests for achieving 15 and 20 victories.
  • Optimized the matchmaking mechanics below Elite I. Players below Elite I no longer lose their Arena points.

Version 1.0.10

  • Added Champion Tier reward: Time-Limited Frame.

Version 1.0.9

  • Increased the Arena Coin rewards for the ranking tally.
  • Removed XP Hourglass from the ranking rewards.

Version 1.0.7

  • Added XP Hourglass rewards temporarily in the Rankings for game balance.

Version 1.0.5

  • Changed the location of claiming Arena Weekly Rewards to the main page.

Version 1.0.4

  • Added Weekly Total Win rewards.
  • Adjusted the ranking rewards for Supreme rank.

Version 1.0.2

  • Optimized the banner-waving effect.

Version 1.0

  • Arena was released.
